title: CCI Local Command Profile Schema
description: Schema for local command profile JSON files that store command-specific defaults and preferences. Schema version LOCAL_PROFILE_SCHEMA_V1. Profile instances must use schema_version LOCAL_PROFILE_V1.

profile_id.description: Machine-readable profile identifier. Should be unique.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date string when the profile was created.

last_modified.description: ISO 8601 date string of last modification.

command_info.description: Identity and address information for the command or activity.

defaults.description: Default field values applied when the payload does not explicitly provide them.

signature_blocks.description: Signature block templates keyed by doc_type. Applied when payload signature is missing.

poc_defaults.description: Default point-of-contact information applied when payload point_of_contact is missing.

style_preferences.description: Local style preferences that comply with SECNAV rules. Do not store preferences that conflict with validator rules.

override_rules.description: Conditional override rules with doc_type and component filters.

scope_tags.description: Tags describing which doc_types and components this profile targets.

safety_notes.description: Warnings about profile content. Real profiles may contain contact information or local command data and should be protected.
